name: Salmon-Wild Rice Pasty Filling
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked wild-rice (cooked in chicken or other flavorful stock)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut salmon into chunks.
2. Put rice in a mixing bowl.
3. Saute onions and pepper in butter and olive oil until soft.
4. Stir in garlic and saute for 1 minute longer.
5. Combine the sauteed onions, pepper, garlic, and butter/oil mixture with the rice and mix well.
6. To assemble pasty, place a layer of rice on the pastry square.
7. Top with chunks of salmon and 1 or 2 teaspoons of chutney.
8. Fold over and bake as directed in the yeast dough recipe.
